videos.headline: Florida Gators vs. Kentucky Wildcats: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida Gators vs. Kentucky Wildcats: Full Highlights) 2025/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Kentucky throttles Florida in Lexington
videos.description: Cutter Boley leads the Wildcats offense that put up 401 yards in a domination of the Gators, 38-7, for their second SEC win in a row.
